mlp_vs_baseline: MLP is not the best by RMSE; Linear Regression has lower RMSE on the test set.
overfitting_note: Validation loss is much higher than train loss.
recommendation_reason: Linear Regression has the lowest RMSE, so it makes fewer large errors on the test set. Final selection should still consider inference time and interpretability.
interpretability_note: Linear/Tree/Random Forest baselines are easier to interpret than MLP.
